privileged_info_summary: The threshold task operates on real Unsplash photograph data: a 687x1031 grayscale portrait image (photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d) with complete desaturation, containing 244 distinct intensity levels suitable for binary thresholding. A fallback Unsplash image and synthetic ImageMagick fallback are available. Verification requires: binary purity ≥90% (pure black ≤30 or pure white ≥225 intensity), grayscale elimination <10%, edge preservation ratio 0.3-3.0, non-trivial distribution (<95% black or white), and >20% pixel modification from original. Pass threshold is 75% (4/5 criteria met). Task allocates 90 seconds and 8 maximum steps.
